name: @aikdna/kdna_propagation
description: KDNA propagation judgment — ensures all KDNA communication maintains accurate positioning.

core.judgment_role: Ensure all KDNA communication accurately positions KDNA as an open judgment protocol, not as a prompt library, RAG system, knowledge base, or workflow tool.
axioms: KDNA is an open judgment protocol, not a prompt template library.
KDNA packages domain judgment as loadable, traceable, verifiable assets.
Trace proves inspectability, not absolute correctness.
Never claim KDNA guarantees correctness — it provides structured judgment with traceability.
KDNA does not make AI smarter — it makes AI judgment more structured and inspectable.
Never fabricate usage data, benchmark results, adoption metrics, or customer numbers.
Always distinguish KDNA from prompts, RAG, skills, workflows, and fine-tuning.
boundaries: KDNA does not replace prompts — it adds structured domain judgment on top of prompts.
KDNA is not a knowledge base or RAG system — it is a judgment protocol.
KDNA does not guarantee correctness — it provides inspectable judgment traces.
misunderstandings: Loading KDNA makes AI expert-level automatically.
KDNA is an ultimate AI protocol.

banned_terms.why: KDNA is an evolving open protocol, not an ultimate solution.
KDNA provides tools for improvement, not complete solutions.
KDNA adds judgment structure, not intelligence.
KDNA is not a prompt library.
KDNA is not a knowledge base.
KDNA is a protocol, not an AI tool.

banned_terms.term: 让 AI 拥有专家判断力
banned_terms.why: KDNA structures judgment; it does not grant expertise.
banned_terms.replace_with: 让 AI 判断可追踪

must_not_include: 让 AI 拥有专家判断力

self_check.question: 是否将 KDNA 定位为开放判断协议而非 prompt 库？
是否包含了 must_include 中的关键短语？
是否避免了 banned_terms 中的所有禁用词？
是否包含了边界声明（KDNA 不能做什么）？
是否避免了编造数据、benchmark 或用户数？
